description_long: This is a cylindrical fire extinguisher with a bright red body and a metallic silver handle and nozzle assembly at the top. A black hose is attached near the top, curving downward and secured along the side of the cylinder. The front of the extinguisher features a white rectangular label with black text reading 'Warning FOAM SPRAY.' The top section includes a lever mechanism for operation and a small round component that may serve as a pressure release or valve. The extinguisher's surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with minor surface details such as seams and indents near the top.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a silver handle, black hose, and a white warning label on the front.
description_view_0: The extinguisher is seen from the back, showing the black hose running vertically and the metallic nozzle at the top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side profile, with the black hose curving outward and the silver handle and nozzle assembly clearly visible.
description_view_2: The extinguisher is viewed from the rear side, showing a mostly plain red surface with a partial view of the white label.
description_view_3: The front view displays the white 'Warning FOAM SPRAY' label, the black hose, and the full handle and nozzle assembly.
attribute_label_or_signage: A white rectangular label with black text reading 'Warning FOAM SPRAY' is present on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, curving downward along the side; the nozzle is metallic and positioned at the top.
